3150020.name: Take Me Home
3150020.description:
She is on a journey with her newborn to get to the safest place in the world, a home. Fortunately she has a best friends, it's a rabbit, that always with her.

Explore the beautiful 2D world

explore a beautiful world, but you never know what is waiting for you out there, so be prepared and try to defeat every obstacle that is trying to stop you.

2 swappable character to play

play as the girl to make sure her newborn is safe, and play as the rabbit to help the girl to solve the puzzle so they can keep going on their journey.

Thrilling adventure

avoid any dangerous things like a saw, a fire, a spike trap, and a wolf?. Just try to stay alive.
